purpose: Record the HKJC full race-number set investigation status after PR-137 without promoting records. This file is not a calendar input.

race_number_set_status.missing_requirement: A source-verified list of every race_number and race_time for the 2026-06-03 Happy Valley meeting.

candidate_discovery_routes_to_inspect.goal: Check whether the official racecard page contains links or navigation controls for all race numbers in the meeting.
Check whether embedded scripts contain a race list, meeting code, or JSON payload used to render race navigation.
Inspect browser network requests for a stable racecard endpoint returning the full race list or each race by race number.
Find an official meeting-level page that lists all races and their start times before loading individual race details.

must_verify_before_promotion: first_race_time from the first source-verified race row
last_race_time from the final source-verified race row
race_count from the source-verified race row count
A reusable route that can be applied to all June 2026 HKJC meetings
promotion_decision.last_race_time_definition: Final race start time, not meeting_end_time.

next_steps: Use browser/devtools or Codex to inspect the official HKJC racecard page links, scripts, and network requests.
If a full race list is found, create a one-meeting verified race_number/race_time snapshot in the next PR.
Promote HKJC to B+ only after the one-meeting snapshot is reproducible and the same official route works for every June 2026 HKJC meeting.
